name: kaitox-x-publisher
description: 本地 Markdown → X (Twitter) Article 草稿：上传端（CLI/Obsidian）+ 本地 relay + Chrome 插件

scripts.build: npm run build -w @kaitox/core && npm run build -w @kaitox/relay && npm run build -w @kaitox/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @kaitox/core && npm run typecheck -w @kaitox/relay && npm run typecheck -w @kaitox/cli
